hooks.command: if [ -f biome.json ] && [ -f package.json ] && [ -d node_modules ] && grep -q '"format"' package.json 2>/dev/null && ([ -f src/config.ts ] || [ -d .planning ]); then bun run format 2>&1 || echo 'Format failed with exit code '$?; fi

if [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then echo '## Moku Planning State (re-injected before compaction)'; cat .planning/STATE.md; fi; if [ -f .planning/decisions.md ]; then echo ''; echo '## Moku Decisions (re-injected before compaction)'; cat .planning/decisions.md; fi; if [ -f .planning/research.md ]; then echo ''; echo '## Moku Research (re-injected before compaction)'; cat .planning/research.md; fi

if [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then TITLE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"title"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"title"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//' | sed 's/"$//'); MSG=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"message"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"message"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//' | sed 's/"$//'); echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') [$TITLE] $MSG" >> .planning/notifications.log; fi
